notes: OpenCode's `opencode run` is single-shot per invocation, so only variant 1 (clean exit) is recorded. The spec asserts: (1) session born in ready, (2) process_exited fires after the working window closes, (3) no transition to waiting in the tail. Variants 2 and 3 (SIGKILL idle / mid-turn) require driver-level sigkill that opencode's interactive driver does not currently expose.

text: Variant 1: session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch
Variant 1: clean exit — process_exited fires after the recording's working window closes; no transition to waiting between birth and exit
